candidate.completion: forward this to my group chat so I can get ignored at scale.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please forward this to my group chat so I can get ignored at scale.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear and logically sound: loneliness becomes the wish to multiply indifference through a group chat. "Ignored at scale" is the strongest phrase and carries the joke's social truth, but the path to it is somewhat wordy and more sharp than elegant.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
